extra.reason: Installed bd 1.0.4, initialized .beads, accepted generated AGENTS.md workflow instructions and created the Goal 001 task graph.

Active dev-preview/migration audit passed. rg over active API/dashboard/schema/skill code found only guard/smoke references; focused operator endpoint/content URL tests, marketer language guard and live_contract_smoke all passed.

Active raw fallback cleanup passed for touched marketer surfaces: no bare brak/brak danych patterns remain in the scanned active sources beyond negative test assertions, focused tests and live API proof passed, and no React remapper or stale alias was introduced.

Recovery docs are aligned with the current Beads graph: closed label cleanup is no longer listed as active work, docs point to bd ready for the queue, and Goal 001 completion check still records UAT/defer as the blocker.
AGENTS.md now includes Beads recovery commands and WILQ-specific source-of-truth boundaries.
Owner defer recorded in docs/handoffs/2026-06-30-owner-defer-marketer-uat.json and validated with scripts/goal_001_completion_check.py --owner-defer

Anti-slop baseline implemented: scripts/audit_complexity.py reports Python hotspots and frozen-file growth risk; proof recorded in docs/handoffs/2026-06-30-goal-002-anti-slop-baseline.md; focused checks passed and historical Ruff/mypy/Fallow failures are documented as baseline debt.

Completed behavior-preserving API route extraction: main.py no longer declares direct @app.get/@app.post route handlers; all endpoint paths are preserved through routers; focused Codex/context route smoke, API tests, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity and git diff --check passed. Remaining heavy context-pack runtime extraction is tracked separately as wilq-seo-462.

Completed behavior-preserving content diagnostics extraction baseline: canonical URL semantics, preflight verdicts, inventory gates, planning decisions, GSC/Ahrefs/GA4/vendor-read decisions, marketer preflight view, API labels, diagnostic sections and operator summary now live under wilq/content. Focused content/API tests and import-boundary smoke passed. Remaining inventory records, ContentWorkItem, preflight v2, claims, drafting, handoff and measurement work is tracked as Goal 002 feature issues.

Completed ContentWorkItem workflow state baseline: typed model and transition blockers now prove preflight, sales brief, claim ledger, human review, audit and measurement gates cannot be skipped. Draft/handoff require a measurement plan, while outcome claims remain blocked until the measurement window is ready.

Completed Content Inventory v1 baseline: structured inventory records and resolution now support preserve-first decisions, missing canonical blockers, dev-preview canonical rejection, duplicate-risk blockers and create_after_review only after a clear duplicate check.

Completed ContentPreflight v2 domain verdict: blocked, plan_allowed, brief_allowed, draft_allowed and handoff_allowed states now compose ContentWorkItem and Content Inventory v1 without drafting, writing or React-side decision logic.

Completed Claim Ledger v1 baseline: claims are structured data with allowed, review-required, blocked and blocked-until-measurement statuses; blocked or unreviewed risky claims cannot be publish-ready and draft remains blocked when claim review/evidence is missing.

Completed Sales Brief v1 baseline: typed brief contract now builds only from valid work item/preflight/inventory/claim ledger inputs, with required evidence, final canonical URL, source facts, forbidden claims and measurement plan. No draft generation or React-side decision logic was added.

Completed Draft Package v1 baseline: outline-first draft packages now build only after draft_allowed preflight, matching Sales Brief, matching Claim Ledger and source-fact evidence mapping. Packages include brief_id, claim_ledger_id, section-to-evidence map, publish-ready claims, blocked claims removed, human review questions and publish_ready=false. Checks passed: tests/content/test_draft_package.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

Completed Human Review v1 baseline: added typed content human review records for sales brief, claim ledger, draft package and WordPress handoff stages. Review requires reviewer, decision, checked items, evidence IDs and handled blocked claims; only approved review can update ContentWorkItem to human_review_status=approved and unblock the WordPress handoff gate. Checks passed: tests/content/test_human_review.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on new review/workflow modules, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.
